subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Hasan! He Who hath attained unto My presence and quaffed the choice wine of Mine utterance hath made mention of thee, and guided the people unto My path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد حسن قد ذکرک من فاز بحضوری و شرب رحیق بیانی و هدی الناس الی صراطی
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
